sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83268" key="pissaloife/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πισσ-ᾰλοιφέω</orth>, <sense id="n83268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">smear with pitch</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
